roa.docketEntryComment: MOT TO VACATE JUDGEMENT FILED TODAY
STAY AWAY ORDER ISSUED 052909  IS TERMINATED AS OF 062409

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF JUNE 19TH, 2009/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:06-19-2009/X: SENTENCE DATE:06-19-2009/ /X:THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGALAND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 06-19-2009 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 06-19-2009 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEING NONEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/X DA MAKES ORALMOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 4 AS 242PC-MISD/DISM3/DEFT ADV NL:4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/BAIL:15000/DOP/NTW/LD:06-29-09/987,2/SAORD/SA1:EVA URBINA, 100 YARDS/SA2:1737 REVERE STREET SAN FRANCISCO, 100 YARDS/WEAP/
/X NO PROBATION/TWS/X NO FINES ORDERED, NO HEARING TO BE FOR ATTORNEY FEE/X:CJ:30 DAYS/CTS:16/COLLECT/VF1/SECFEE/ICNA/
